title: Species distribution models for marine species occurring in European waters - OBIS/MPA Europe
description: The EU Horizon project Marine Protected Areas Europe (MPA Europe, https://mpa-europe.eu) generated priority maps identifying locations within the European seas where Marine Protected Areas (MPAs) would protect the greatest number of species, habitats, and ecosystems. The IOC's Ocean Biodiversity Information System (OBIS) developed Species Distribution Models (SDMs) for more than 12,000 species to serve as biodiversity inputs for the prioritization. The models were generated for both current and future periods (2050 and 2100) under five Shared Socio-economic Pathway (SSP) scenarios.
